description: ElevenLabs v3 cases with longer conversational context and backchannels anchored after complete statements.

cases.title: Backchannel after budget update
cases.description: Speaker B acknowledges after Speaker A states a complete scheduling update, while A continues with the reason.

speaker_a.text: [matter-of-fact] After the morning call, I moved the budget review to next week, because finance still needs one more day to check the numbers before they sign off.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A keeps the floor. Text is sent exactly as written.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the complete statement anchor.

placement.anchor_text: I moved the budget review to next week

cases.title: Backchannel after evidence statement
cases.description: Speaker B acknowledges after Speaker A states the core evidence, while A continues with the interpretation.

speaker_a.text: [calm] I checked the logs from last night, and the restart happened right after the backup job finished, so the timing makes sense and I do not think it was a user action.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A continues the same turn.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: minimal acknowledgment, no delivery tag.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the evidence statement anchor.

placement.anchor_text: the restart happened right after the backup job finished

cases.title: Backchannel after decision
cases.description: Speaker B acknowledges after a decision is stated, while A continues with the rationale.

speaker_a.text: [steady] We decided to keep the current rollout date, because moving it again would make the support schedule harder to manage and would confuse the pilot customers.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A should keep the floor after the decision statement.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: short acknowledgment after a decision.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the decision statement anchor.

placement.anchor_text: We decided to keep the current rollout date

cases.title: Backchannel after problem statement
cases.description: Speaker B acknowledges after Speaker A states the full problem, before A gives the consequence.

speaker_a.text: [concerned] The main issue is that the upload sometimes fails without an error message, so the user thinks the file went through and does not try again.
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: continuous explanation with a clear problem statement before the consequence.

speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: minimal acknowledgment, no delivery tag.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 300 ms after the full problem statement anchor.

placement.anchor_text: the upload sometimes fails without an error message

cases.title: Deadline correction with context
cases.description: Speaker B interrupts with a correction and enough surrounding detail to sound like a coherent turn.

speaker_a.text: [conversational] I think the design review is on Thursday afternoon, so if we want people to read the notes first, we should probably send the draft by Wednesday-
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: incomplete ending expressed directly in text.

speaker_b.text: [jumping in] Wednesday noon, actually. They moved the review up because the client team is traveling on Thursday.
speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: correction plus explanatory context.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 50 ms before the last word of the interruption anchor, corrected by B audio onset.

cases.title: Safety constraint with context
cases.description: Speaker B interrupts to add a constraint, then explains why it matters.

speaker_a.text: [planning aloud] We can ship the preview build to the test group this afternoon, and then collect feedback before the wider rollout, as long as the consent copy-
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A is planning aloud and leaves the condition unfinished.

speaker_b.text: [quickly] Only if the consent copy is updated first. The old version still says recordings are optional, and that is not true for this test.
speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: quick but cooperative constraint with context.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 50 ms before the last word of the interruption anchor, corrected by B audio onset.

placement.anchor_text: as long as the consent copy

cases.title: Dashboard context completion
cases.description: Speaker B jumps in with missing context and a fuller explanation.

speaker_a.text: [explaining] The dashboard numbers look lower this week, but I do not think traffic actually dropped. It is probably because we excluded the-
speaker_a.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: Speaker A starts an explanation and leaves the cause open.

speaker_b.text: [jumping in] We excluded the trial accounts. That change went live on Monday, so the comparison is not apples to apples.
speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: concise context correction followed by explanation.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 50 ms before the end of the interruption anchor, corrected by B audio onset.

cases.title: Travel correction with context
cases.description: Speaker B interrupts a travel plan with a correction and concrete replacement detail.

speaker_a.text: [casual] We could take the train from the central station after lunch, because the last direct one leaves from central around-

speaker_b.text: [correcting gently] No, they moved that route to the north station. If we leave from central, we will have to change twice.
speaker_b.instruction: ElevenLabs v3: friendly correction with useful context.

cases.alignment_notes: Auto-place B 50 ms before the last word of the interruption anchor, corrected by B audio onset.
